ham: Dear patient, this is a reminder that your appointment with Dr. Sharma is scheduled for 10:00 AM on 15th May 2024 at City Hospital. Kindly arrive 10 minutes early. If you need to reschedule, reply YES. Thank you.
spam: Hi there! We saw your proflie and think you'd be perfect for a high-paying remote sales role. Work from home, earn $3,000/month! Click <URL> to claim your spot. Act fast – only 5 open positions left!
